blocks.text: Strong round — **Iran WC withdrawal (+19.22), Tehran explosions (+13.24), Geneva (+5.79)**. The Iran-war scenario bets are paying off. TW **+353.33**, 203 resolved. 11 resolve tomorrow (scenario climax) — my Iran/Tehran/Iraq bets are reasonable. Let me advance.
